## Summary

Corrects the main landing page so RevisionGrade is positioned around the WAVE Revision System™, not just generic manuscript evaluation.

## Why

The current homepage says “13 dimensions” and “controlled revision path,” but it does not clearly explain the core product architecture: evaluation first, WAVE-governed repair second, author control throughout.

## Changes

- Rewrites the hero around: “Diagnose the manuscript. Then repair it through WAVE.”
- Adds explicit WAVE Revision System™ positioning.
- Adds the public sequence: Architecture → Criteria → Gate → WAVE → Readiness.
- Adds WAVE phase-group cards:
  - Structural Integrity
  - Character & Dialogue Systems
  - Theme & World Logic
  - Pacing & Momentum
  - Literary Authority
- Clarifies the relationship between the 13 story criteria and WAVE repair.
- Keeps short-form scope honest: short-form uses the 13 criteria only; long-form can activate manuscript-scale continuity and WAVE where appropriate.
- Adds Revise Queue and TrustedPath™ sections to the homepage.
- Preserves current manuscript-only Storygate and Agent Readiness scope.

## Scope

Public homepage copy and structure only. No backend, database, evaluation, scoring, WAVE runtime, Revise runtime, or pipeline logic changed.
